channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Trump says Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei is dead after US-Israeli strikes - BBC
item.description:
1. Trump says Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei is dead after US-Israeli strikes  BBC
  2. Live: Trump says Khamenei is dead, Iran says he is 'commanding the field'  Reuters
  3. From Tehran to Dubai: Geolocated videos show the shockwaves of US-Israeli strikes — and Iran’s retaliation  CNN
  4. Live updates: Trump says Iranian Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei is dead. Iran has not confirmed his death  AP News
  5. Iran's Ayatollah Ali Khamenei is killed in Israeli strike, ending 36-year iron rule  NPR

item.description:

item.title: Sen. Tom Cotton says U.S., allies looking at "weeks, not days, of joint efforts" in Iran - CBS News
